top_findings.summary: The skill description claims to analyze "local files" but actually requires uploading all documents to Google NotebookLM (a third-party cloud service) via browser automation. This is fundamentally different from local analysis and exposes sensitive business documents, strategy plans, and financial reports to Google's servers without clear disclosure that this is actually a cloud-based service, not local analysis. The skill requests broad file access permissions under the pretense of local analysis while performing cloud uploads.
